cardReadingDirection: Soon — within the next one to three months, most likely at the next clear shift in your routine or season, because all three cards point to fast, favorable timing rather than a long wait. Card 1 (Wheel of Fortune) = the meeting arrives through a cycle change outside the user's control — a new job, a move, a schedule or season change — so they should say yes to upcoming changes of environment instead of waiting in familiar places. Card 2 (The Lovers) = this is a genuine values-aligned match that appears only after the user makes a deliberate choice to be available — actively choosing to date or committing to one social scene — rather than passively hoping. Card 3 (Eight of Wands) = once first contact happens it accelerates quickly (messages, invitations, rapid momentum), so the user should reply promptly and keep the coming weeks flexible rather than letting things stall. Concretely: starting this week, accept every invitation that puts you in a new environment and open or refresh one active channel for meeting people — a dating profile, a class, or a recurring event — so you are visible when the window opens in the next few months.
